# NRG Zine

> A living archive of energy, culture, and global nightlife intelligence — by the community, for the community.

NRG Zine is an independent cultural publication covering electronic music, nightlife, sustainability, and conscious culture. Published from within the global dance music community, it features multiple editorial voices and community contributions. The zine operates from blondish.world but maintains editorial independence as a community resource.

## Music — Genre Guides, Production, DJ Culture

- [Organic House Music: The Definitive Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/music/organic-house-music-guide/): Origins, defining artists (BLOND:ISH, Lee Burridge, Bedouin), essential tracks, key labels (Abracadabra, All Day I Dream), and genre comparisons.
- [Afro House Music: Origins, Artists & Essential Tracks](https://blondish.world/zine/music/afro-house-music-guide/): South African origins from kwaito to modern afro house, key artists (Black Coffee, Shimza, Caiiro), essential tracks and global scene.
- [Melodic House Music Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/music/melodic-house-music-guide/): Artists, labels like Afterlife and Diynamic, and the genre's evolution.
- [Underground House Music Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/music/underground-house-music-guide/): Labels, events, and artists keeping house music's original spirit alive.
- [Best DJ Mixes: Essential Listening](https://blondish.world/zine/music/best-dj-mixes/): Curated list of essential DJ mixes across house, techno, and electronic genres.
- [How to Get Into DJing](https://blondish.world/zine/music/how-to-get-into-djing/): Complete beginner's guide — equipment, beatmatching, track selection, first gigs.
- [Music Production Tips From Working Producers](https://blondish.world/zine/music/production-tips/): Professional workflow — starting ideas, arrangement, mixing, finishing tracks.

## Ibiza — Insider Guides & Seasonal Intelligence

- [Best Clubs in Ibiza 2026](https://blondish.world/zine/ibiza/best-clubs-ibiza-2026/): Insider guide to every major venue — Pacha, DC-10, Hi Ibiza, Amnesia, Cova Santa. Capacity, music, door policies, honest opinions.
- [Ibiza Nightlife Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/ibiza/nightlife-guide/): Complete guide to the island's electronic music culture, parties, and seasonal calendar.
- [Ibiza Club Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/ibiza/clubs-guide/): Detailed venue-by-venue breakdown with music styles and practical information.

## Culture — Community Stories, Scene Reports, Festivals

- [Best Female DJs in Electronic Music](https://blondish.world/zine/culture/female-djs-electronic-music/): Women transforming electronic music — top female DJs and the changing landscape.
- [Club Culture: Disco to the Digital Dancefloor](https://blondish.world/zine/culture/club-culture-history/): History of nightlife from 1970s New York through Chicago house, UK rave, and today.
- [Tulum Nightlife Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/culture/tulum-nightlife/): Jungle venues, cenotes, and Mexico's electronic music capital.
- [Burning Man Music Guide](https://blondish.world/zine/culture/burning-man-music/): Sound camps, art cars, sunrise sets, and navigating Black Rock City.
- [Music Festival Packing List](https://blondish.world/zine/culture/festival-packing-list/): Complete checklist with sustainable alternatives for every essential.

## Energy — Consciousness, Sustainability, Science of Sound

- [Sound Healing and Electronic Music](https://blondish.world/zine/energy/sound-healing-electronic-music/): Neuroscience of bass, entrainment, and why the dancefloor works like a healing ritual.
- [Sustainability in the Music Industry](https://blondish.world/zine/energy/sustainability-music-industry/): How music is going green — Bye Bye Plastic, eco-festivals, carbon footprints, and solutions.

## About

- [About BLOND:ISH](https://blondish.world/about/): Biography of Vivie-Ann Bakos — DJ, producer, and founder of Abracadabra and Bye Bye Plastic.
- [Tour Dates](https://blondish.world/tour/): Upcoming events and tickets.
- [Music / Discography](https://blondish.world/music/): 390+ releases.
- [Abracadabra](https://blondish.world/projects/abracadabra/): Record label and events platform.
- [Bye Bye Plastic](https://blondish.world/projects/bye-bye-plastic/): Sustainability initiative.

## Community

- [Submit to NRG Zine](https://blondish.world/zine/submit/): Write for the zine — stories, mixes, photos, scene reports.
- [NRG Zine Archive](https://blondish.world/zine/): Full article archive across all clusters.
